title: cirsium muticum
intro: Cirsium muticum, also known as the narrow-leaved thistle or narrow-leaved plume moths, is a species of thistle in the sunflower family, Asteraceae. The plant is used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are beneficial in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Cirsium muticum include reducing inflammation, relieving digestive problems, and alleviating respiratory issues. Cirsium muticum can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture to be consumed as a tea or used in topical applications.
